mapper.sql: id, job_no, produce_plan_id, order_id, process_route_id, color_code, size_code, plan_qty, actual_qty, defect_qty, current_process_id, current_process_status, start_time, finish_time, outsource_batch_barcode, outbound_time, receive_time, confirm_qty, outsource_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_produce_job ( job_no, produce_plan_id, order_id, process_route_id, color_code, size_code, plan_qty, actual_qty, defect_qty, current_process_id, current_process_status, start_time, finish_time, outsource_batch_barcode, outbound_time, receive_time, confirm_qty, outsource_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{jobNo}, #{producePlanId}, #{orderId}, #{processRouteId}, #{colorCode}, #{sizeCode}, #{planQty}, #{actualQty}, #{defectQty}, #{currentProcessId}, #{currentProcessStatus}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{outsourceBatchBarcode}, #{outboundTime}, #{receiveTime}, #{confirmQty}, #{outsourceId}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )

INSERT INTO t_erp_produce_job ( job_no, produce_plan_id, order_id, color_code, size_code, plan_qty, actual_qty, defect_qty, current_process_id, current_process_status, start_time, finish_time, outsource_batch_barcode, outbound_time, receive_time, confirm_qty, outsource_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.jobNo}, #{item.producePlanId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.colorCode}, #{item.sizeCode}, #{item.planQty}, #{item.actualQty}, #{item.defectQty}, #{item.currentProcessId}, #{item.currentProcessStatus}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.finishTime}, #{item.outsourceBatchBarcode}, #{item.outboundTime}, #{item.receiveTime}, #{item.confirmQty}, #{item.outsourceId}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_erp_produce_job SET job_no = #{jobNo}, produce_plan_id = #{producePlanId}, order_id = #{orderId}, process_route_id = #{processRouteId}, color_code = #{colorCode}, size_code = #{sizeCode}, plan_qty = #{planQty}, actual_qty = #{actualQty}, defect_qty = #{defectQty}, current_process_id = #{currentProcessId}, current_process_status = #{currentProcessStatus}, start_time = #{startTime}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, outsource_batch_barcode = #{outsourceBatchBarcode}, outbound_time = #{outboundTime}, receive_time = #{receiveTime}, confirm_qty = #{confirmQty}, outsource_id = #{outsourceId}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark}, id = id WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE produce_plan_id = #{producePlanId} ORDER BY color_code, size_code
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(plan_qty), 0) FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE produce_plan_id = #{producePlanId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_qty), 0) FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE produce_plan_id = #{producePlanId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE create_time >= #{today} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{today}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE current_process_id = #{processId} AND status = '1' AND current_process_status != '2'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(plan_qty), 0) FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE current_process_id = #{processId} AND status = '1' AND current_process_status != '2'

SELECT CEILING(COALESCE(SUM(actual_qty), 0) / DATEDIFF(#{end}, #{start})) FROM t_erp_produce_job WHERE current_process_id = #{processId} AND status = '2' AND finish_time >= #{start} AND finish_time <= #{end}

SELECT p.employee_id as employeeId, p.employee_name as employeeName, SUM(p.out_qty) as monthlyQuantity, IFNULL(SUM(p.out_qty * epp.unit_price), 0) as monthlyWage, CEILING(SUM(p.out_qty) / NULLIF(DATEDIFF(#{end}, #{start}), 0)) as dailyAverage FROM t_erp_produce_job_process p LEFT JOIN t_erp_employee_process_price epp ON p.employee_id = epp.employee_id AND p.process_id = epp.process_id WHERE p.finish_time >= #{start} AND p.finish_time <= #{end} AND p.employee_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.employee_id, p.employee_name ORDER BY monthlyQuantity DESC
